text: we love our nex playground!
text_zh: 我们爱我们的 Nex 游乐场！

text: $250 and a subscription in order to play games just buy a Nintendo switch
text_zh: 250 美元加上订阅才能玩游戏，还不如直接买个 Nintendo Switch。

text: Spent $300 on this and my son has a meltdown every time I turn it on lol
text_zh: 花了300美元买了这个，但我儿子每次我开机他都会崩溃 lol

text: Quit Screen Time while looking at a gigantic screen😂
text_zh: 一边看着巨屏一边戒掉屏幕时间😂

text: [Sticker] He’s like
text_zh: [贴纸] 他就像

text: These comments are funny 🤣 you’re literally showing how you and YOUR FAMILY have fun and people are saying “nahhh do this” lmao anyway we have the Nex too and love it!! I like the fitness apps too!!
text_zh: 这些评论太好笑了🤣你们明明在展示自己和家人怎么玩，别人还在说“不行，应该这样” lmao 我们也有Nex，而且很喜欢！！我也喜欢健身app！！

text: This is such a fun game system!!
text_zh: 这真是一个有趣的游戏系统！！

text: I’ll wait for the price to come down
text_zh: 我等降价

text: My girls want one! They are doing chores to earn money for it!
text_zh: 我女儿们想要一个！她们正在做家务赚钱买！

text: And it’s HSA/fsa eligible
text_zh: 而且它是HSA/FSA可以报销的

text: This is great during the winter months in Wisconsin! My daughter has one and she loves everything and it’s great for sleep overs
text_zh: 威斯康星州的冬天用这个太棒了！我女儿有一个，她非常喜欢，特别适合过夜留宿。

text: We bought one and my kids have already forgotten about it.
text_zh: 我们买了一个，我孩子已经忘了它了。

text: love that!
text_zh: 爱了爱了！

text: This looks really fun!
text_zh: 这看起来太好玩了！

text: im glad i still have my Xbox 360 lol got all the games I need that do the same thing, wii also does this and helps.
text_zh: 我很高兴我还有我的 Xbox 360 哈哈，我有很多游戏可以做同样的事情，Wii 也能做到并且有帮助。

text: I had my kids too early in life all the cool stuff is finally coming out
text_zh: 我生孩子太早了，现在这些好玩的东西才出来

text: That looks like so much fun!
text_zh: 看起来太好玩了！

text: can get a kinect and xbox one for $100
text_zh: 100美元可以买到一个Kinect和一个Xbox One

text: So fun!!! It almost reminds me of the days I’d play Wii with my kiddos! 💙
text_zh: 太好玩了！！！让我想起了当年和孩子们一起玩Wii的日子！💙

text: Benny loves Bluey 🐕
text_zh: Benny 喜欢 Bluey 🐕

text: You’re so awesome 🤩 I love this 💜😎💪🏾
text_zh: 你太棒了 🤩 我爱这个 💜😎💪🏾

text: This is great 😂
text_zh: 太棒了😂

text: I love this !
text_zh: 我喜欢这个！

text: Your shirt was still moving even tho you were froze😂
text_zh: 你衣服还在动，即使你已经定格了😂

text: Go outside
text_zh: 出去玩

text: Everything but OUTSIDE!
text_zh: 啥都有，就是没有户外！

text: Oh I love this my kids would love this so much
text_zh: 哦我喜欢这个，我的孩子们肯定会超喜欢的

text: Soo cool!
text_zh: 太酷了！

text: we have this, and my boys love it. Some games are really difficult. Some are just fun and creative. But when it's below zero and no one wants to be outside, this gets us moving
text_zh: 我们家有这个，我儿子们超喜欢。有些游戏很难，有些就很有趣很有创意。但冬天零下没法出去玩的时候，这个能让我们动起来

text: sold. I have 5 boys
text_zh: 成交。我有5个儿子

text: I love bluey but it sets unrealistic expectations of parents.
text_zh: 我爱Bluey，但它给家长树立了不切实际的期望。

text: I want it but I’m just not cool with having to pay a subscription. Like I’d rather just BUY the games I want😅
text_zh: 我想要，但我不太接受要付订阅费。我宁愿直接买我想要的游戏😅

text:
I just got this!! Oh my goodness its amazing!
me and my kids love it
text_zh: 我刚拿到这个！！我的天哪，太棒了！我和孩子们都爱死它了

text: Looks fun but annoyingly laggy. I’ll wait for Gen 2 or something 😂😂😂
text_zh: 看起来好玩但卡得要命。我等第二代或者别的吧 😂😂😂

text: Honestly it’s as much for us as it is for the kids. My hubby and I get way too competitive with the basketball game… he’s still salty that I beat him again this morning! 😂haha It’s basically our new date night. 🏀
text_zh: 说实话，这东西对我们来说跟对孩子们一样。我老公和我在这篮球游戏上太较真了……他今天早上又被我打败了，还在郁闷呢！😂哈哈，这基本上成了我们的新约会之夜。 🏀

text: Reminds me of the eye toy PlayStation had
text_zh: 让我想起了 PlayStation 的 EyeToy

text: my son has been asking me for one so he began to save his money
text_zh: 我儿子一直跟我念叨想要一个，他已经开始攒钱了

text: This looks so fun! My daughter would love this!
text_zh: 看起来太好玩了！我女儿会喜欢这个！

text: We got our kids one for Christmas and my daughter says it’s the best gift ever. My nieces love coming over to play it. We are even taking it out next vacation so they can play in the room while I cook breakfast in the mornings! 🥰
text_zh: 我们圣诞节给孩子买了，我女儿说这是最好的礼物。我侄女们也爱来玩。我们甚至要去度假带上它，这样我早上做饭的时候她们可以在房间里玩！🥰

text: Bought this and it only worked for 2 hours….
text_zh: 买了之后只用了 2 个小时……

text: My family had so much fun with this. Definitely worth it and it literally gets you moving and there’s games for adults. Let me tell you I was sore and tired the first three days of using it.
text_zh: 我家人用这个玩得很开心。绝对值，而且真的能让你动起来，还有适合大人的游戏。我告诉你，我用了头三天都又累又酸。

text: I can’t wait til my baby is like a little older imma have so much fun with this…oh and her too I hope 😂
text_zh: 我等我宝宝再大一点，我就可以跟他一起玩了，玩得可开心了…哦，希望她也开心 😂

text: I loveeeeee this but I wish it wasn’t automatic like if u leave the screen it continues to play which makes me think it’s really just doing whatever in the game instead of tracking what I’m really doing if that makes sense ? Still love it tho esp the exercise one :)
text_zh: 我超级爱这个，但就是希望它不是自动的，比如你离开了屏幕，它还在继续玩，这让我觉得它只是在游戏里随便玩玩，而不是追踪我到底在做什么，明白我的意思吗？不过我还是很爱它，尤其是那个运动的 :)

text: how much is the subscription??
text_zh: 订阅费多少钱？？

text: I make my baby play this game everyday.
text_zh: 我每天都让我宝贝玩这个游戏。

text: My kids love theirs and ours randomly stopped working I have to email them 😭😭 but it’s so fun for when it’s colder and they need to get some energy out!!
text_zh: 我孩子超爱他们的，我们家的突然坏了，得给他们发邮件😭😭但是天气冷的时候又不能出去玩，这个太适合让他们消耗精力了！！

text: How easy it to setup?
text_zh: 安装起来有多容易？

text: I swear that one cheats...I can neva get more points than my grandbaby 😂😂😂😂
text_zh: 我发誓那个作弊了...我永远都得不了比我孙子高的分数 😂😂😂😂

text: Yes
text_zh: 是的

text: Good time , I love this game.
text_zh: 玩得很开心，我爱这个游戏。

text: my daughter fave game

text: It’s basically a Wii and no one even wants a Wii now
text_zh: 这基本上就是个Wii，现在都没人想要Wii了

text: My kids love this! So fun!
text_zh: 我孩子超爱这个！太好玩了！

text: Looks like so much fun!!!
text_zh: 看起来太好玩了！！！

text_zh: 我需要这个ssss

text: Well, unlike others, I appreciated this! I had never heard of it before now! 💕

text_zh: 150你就能成交

text: We love ours!!
text_zh: 我们很喜欢我们的！

text_zh: 还是屏幕时间 😂

text_zh: 脑力休息视频 😅

text: I can’t wait for this to be cheaper😭
text_zh: 我等不及它降价了😭

text: That looks so fun & like a good workout for me! 😂
text_zh: 这看起来太好玩了，而且对我是个很好的锻炼！😂

text: My friends have this ❤️it’s fun the kids love it
text_zh: 我朋友有这个 ❤️，超好玩，孩子们特别喜欢

text_zh: 我们也有这个，真的就值这么多。我们很喜欢。哈哈

text_zh: 哦，这多有趣啊！！能让孩子们运动 ❤️还有大孩子们 🥰

text: Isn’t this still technically screen time?
text_zh: 这不算还是屏幕时间吗？

text: My kids just did their dance party before bed. They love the darn thing
text_zh: 我的孩子们睡前刚跳完舞派对。他们超爱这个东西！

text: This looks amazing. I’ve had my eye on this
text_zh: 这个看起来太棒了。我关注这个很久了

text: It’s good if you have more then 1 person playing. My daughter would play but would get bored because no one else was playing with her
text_zh: 如果有多于一个人玩会比较好。我女儿会玩，但如果没人和她一起玩她就会觉得无聊

text: Oh my goodness this is so fun my grandson and I enjoy herself with
text_zh: 天呐，这个太好玩了，我孙子和我都很享受

text: wait I thought you just paid $50 one time to get more games? it's monthly? or yearly?
text_zh: 等等，我以为你一次性付50美元就能玩更多游戏了？是按月还是按年？

text: If you grab it for Easter now, you'll be set up and ready just in time for the Avatar and Dora drops next month! 🌊👧🏻
text_zh: 如果在复活节现在买，下个月《阿凡达》和《朵拉》出来的时候，你就已经准备好了！🌊👧🏻

text: It was 200$ last month 🥺 been waiting for the price to go down an it went up!😅
text_zh: 上个月才200美元🥺，我一直在等它降价，结果反而涨了！😅

text: Wow. Be great for my kids when it’s raining.
text_zh: 哇。下雨天的时候，这个给我的孩子们玩肯定很棒。

text: We’re Nex obsessed 🥰
text_zh: 我们 Nex 迷上啦 🥰

text: When it’s gloomy, we play for hours. The educational games are tons of fun!
text_zh: 天气阴沉的时候，我们玩好几个小时。那些教育游戏超好玩的！

text: Currently watching my kids play on theirs while I chile. It’s the only time they aren’t fighting 😅
text_zh: 我现在看着我的孩子们在玩，我在旁边歇着呢。这是他们唯一不打架的时候 😅

text: This is screen time. My kid has one and acts psycho just like any other screen.
text_zh: 这就是屏幕时间。我孩子也有一个，就像其他屏幕一样，变得很疯狂。

text: my kid is adhd and I have my gma who doesnt get up much at all and my kids always wanting youtube or minecraft..I got this and not once asked for xbox and my gma is loving bowling! its great for tbe entire family. it does suck you cant go and choose whatgames you want but it does come with ALOT when you have pass
text_zh: 我孩子有多动症，我奶奶也不怎么动，孩子们总想玩YouTube或我的世界……我买了这个之后，他们一次都没提过Xbox，我奶奶也爱玩保龄球！对全家人都很好。不能自己选游戏确实有点糟，但如果你买了会员，它会附带很多游戏。

text: @Nicole Long
text_zh: @Nicole Long

text: oh so now the people can not only hack our wifi but probably hack into this and see full view of the house 😂 love thaaaatttt. I wanted one...
text_zh: 哦，那人们不仅能黑我们的 WiFi，还能黑进这个，看到家里的一切 😂 太棒了，我想要一个…
